<?php namespace Aws\AppConfigData; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWS AppConfig Data** service. * @method \Aws\Result getLatestConfiguration(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise getLatestConfigurationAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result startConfigurationSession(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise startConfigurationSessionAsync(array $args = []) */ class AppConfigDataClient extends AwsClient {}
